sections.title: Hero
sections.note: Title, highlight, subtitle, CTAs and bullets all match live.

sections.title: 6 vues produit tabs
sections.note: Tab labels and icons reproduced. Title/subtitle synthesized but faithful since live tabs have no explicit heading.

sections.title: Client logos
sections.note: All 5 logos preserved with correct title.

sections.title: Stats
sections.note: All 4 stats with values and labels match.

sections.title: Vrais problèmes
sections.note: All 6 pain points with bold formatting preserved.

sections.title: De l'idée au scénario
sections.note: 5 steps preserved. Last step on live shows '→' as number rather than '5' but title 'Scénario en 10 min' kept.

sections.title: Notre parti pris
sections.note: Live has 3 cards each with separate title (Macro/Maintenable/Actionnable) and description. Extraction merges them into a single label string per item, losing structured title/description split.

sections.title: Témoignages
sections.note: Both testimonials preserved with avatars, names, roles, companies, LinkedIn URLs.

sections.title: Sécurité
sections.note: 4 badges preserved; labels combine title + description with em-dash which is acceptable.

sections.title: Final CTA
sections.note: Two action items with icons, labels, hrefs preserved.

audit.summary: Extraction is highly faithful to the live page. All 20 sections from the live HTML are present in the JSON in the correct order with correct content, images, CTAs, and bullets. Minor weakness: the 'Notre parti pris' icon-row collapses the three card titles (Macro, pas micro / Maintenable / Actionnable) and their descriptions into single label strings rather than preserving structured title+description fields. Otherwise, hero highlight, pain points, all feature-splits with correct image alternation, stats, testimonials with LinkedIn URLs, trust badges, FAQ items, and final dual-CTA all match live.
